name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* State of each process: idle, trying, critical *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initial state: all processes idle *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
       /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state'[j] = state[j]

(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
          /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : i # j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = -1 means fork f is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
    \/ (* Philosopher p becomes hungry *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N : states[p] = "thinking"
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
    \/ (* Philosopher p picks up forks if both are free *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
            /\ states[p] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[p] = -1
            /\ forks[If p = 1 then N else p-1] = -1
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = p, ![If p = 1 then N else p-1] = p]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
    \/ (* Philosopher p puts down forks *)
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
            /\ states[p] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = -1, ![If p = 1 then N else p-1] = -1]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(1..N))]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer(x) == /\ count < K
              /\ q[tail] = x
              /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ count' = count + 1
              /\ head' = head

Consumer(y) == /\ count > 0
              /\ y = q[head]
              /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
              /\ count' = count - 1
              /\ tail' = tail

Next == \/ Producer(x) \/ Consumer(y)

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head' \in 1..K
          /\ tail' \in 1..K
          /\ count' \in 0..K
          /\ q' \in [1..K -> Nat]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [x \in 1..N |-> -> NULL]
        /\ state = [x \in 1..N |-> -> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E x \in 1..N : (state[x] = "Follower" /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
                            /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![x] = NULL]
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![x] = "Candidate"])
        \/ \E x \in 1..N : (state[x] = "Candidate" /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
                            /\ votedFor' = votedFor
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![x] = "Leader"])
        \/ \E x \in 1..N : (state[x] = "Leader" /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
                            /\ votedFor' = votedFor
                            /\ state' = state)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> ====
